Duval County FHA Loans

FHA loans in Duval County, Florida

FHA loans across Duval County with as little as 3.5% down. Here's the county's 2026 FHA loan limit, why Jacksonville is so FHA-friendly, and how to get pre-approved.

Duval County Home Loans

FHA loans in Duval County, Florida

Duval County is essentially the city of Jacksonville — one of the largest cities by land area in the country, with a notably affordable housing market for its size. A strong military presence, growing logistics and finance sectors, and abundant land for new construction make it one of Florida's most accessible markets. The FHA loan limit comfortably covers the typical Duval home, so 3.5% down opens a lot of doors here.

Duval County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Duval County

With the 2026 FHA floor of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Duval County home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In Duval's affordable market, that covers the vast majority of homes, including plenty of new construction. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so we confirm Duval County's exact figure with HUD.

Affordable big-city homeownership in Jacksonville

Jacksonville's affordability means FHA's loan limit stretches a long way, and the area's new-construction communities are ideal FHA candidates — great for first-time buyers. With a large military community (including NAS Jacksonville), some buyers compare FHA with VA; our FHA vs. VA guide breaks down which fits. Pair FHA with Florida assistance and gift funds to minimize cash to close.

Cities We Serve

FHA loans in Duval County cities

We help FHA buyers throughout Duval County, including Jacksonville. Explore our local guides for a closer look at the market, loan limits, and down payment help in each:

Jacksonville

Down payment help in Duval County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Duval County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Duval County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Duval County for 2026?+
Duval County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers nearly all Jacksonville homes. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Jacksonville good for FHA buyers?+
Yes — it's one of Florida's most affordable major markets, with lots of new construction and prices well within the FHA limit.
Should I use FHA or VA in Jacksonville?+
If you're a qualifying veteran or service member, VA may offer 0% down; otherwise FHA is the go-to low-down-payment option. Our FHA vs. VA guide compares them.
How much down payment do I need in Duval County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Duval County?+
Yes — Jacksonville and surrounding communities including the Beaches and Baldwin.
